jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - SAIL - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, SAIL in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SAIL:
SAIL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAIL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
